home.title: SceneSelf — AI Scene Album Generator for Creators
home.description: SceneSelf turns a single selfie into a cinematic, magazine-grade scene album in minutes — no studio, no shoot, no waiting.

pricing.title: Pricing - SceneSelf
pricing.description: Weekly, monthly, or yearly — pick a SceneSelf subscription that matches how often you want a new scene set. Watermark removed on every generated frame.

blog.title: Blog - SceneSelf
blog.description: Latest insights and updates from our team. Learn about AI SaaS development, vibe coding, and best practices for building production-ready applications.

contact.title: Contact Us - SceneSelf
contact.description: Get in touch with the SceneSelf team. We'd love to hear from you and respond as quickly as possible.

login.title: Login - SceneSelf
login.description: Sign in to your SceneSelf account to access powerful AI tools and services for your business.

signup.title: Sign Up - SceneSelf
signup.description: Create your SceneSelf account and start building your AI SaaS product today with our powerful tools.

terms.title: Terms of Service - SceneSelf
terms.description: Read our terms of service to understand the rules and guidelines for using SceneSelf platform.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy - SceneSelf
privacy.description: Learn how SceneSelf collects, uses, and protects your personal information and data.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy - SceneSelf
cookies.description: Understand how SceneSelf uses cookies and similar tracking technologies on our platform.

refund.title: Refund Policy - SceneSelf
